products.description: A retro pixel art cat wearing a Demos hoodie. Rare limited edition.

products.title: Glitch Wave #42
products.description: Generative glitch art. One of a kind on-chain collectible.

products.title: Demos Genesis Crown
products.description: Wearable NFT crown for your Demos profile. Legendary tier.

products.description: Hand-drawn dragon that supposedly lives on every chain at once.
